## Source-status boundary

- [ ] No raw evidence or confidential source records are added to GitHub.
- [ ] New files are code, schemas, docs, synthetic samples, design tokens, or redacted test rows.
- [ ] Google Drive/native source remains the source-of-truth lane.

## Tooling impact

- [ ] Adds or updates a reasoning skill.
- [ ] Adds or updates a schema.
- [ ] Adds or updates a CLI tool.
- [ ] Adds or updates tests.
- [ ] Adds or updates Hugging Face routing notes.
- [ ] Adds or updates Figma/design-system handoff.

## Quality gate

- [ ] Unit tests pass.
- [ ] Sample visual quality gate passes.
- [ ] Source-status scorecard runs.
- [ ] Chart router sample runs.

## Review notes

State what this PR changes, what it does not change, and what still requires source closure.
